## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have added integration tests for new features
- [ ] I have added E2E tests for critical user flows

### Security
- [ ] I have not introduced any new security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not exposed any secrets or API keys
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs
- [ ] I have followed OWASP security guidelines

### Performance
- [ ] I have not introduced any performance regressions
- [ ] I have optimized database queries if applicable
- [ ] I have considered caching strategies

### GDPR/Privacy
- [ ] I have not introduced any new PII handling
- [ ] I have documented any new data processing activities
- [ ] I have implemented proper data retention if applicable

### Anthropic Benchmarks
- [ ] This change supports agent code-writing (80%+ target)
- [ ] This change supports task success rate (76%+ target)
- [ ] This change supports bug catch rate (33%+ target)
